# Backend Module

## 1. Overview

This backend module handles API requests.

## 2. Error Handling

### Error Codes:

The following error codes are defined:
- 400: Bad Request
- 401: Unauthorized
- 404: Not Found
- 500: Internal Server Error

HTTP 400: Client error response
HTTP 500: Server error response

## ACCEPTANCE

- [ ] All error codes documented

## OPEN_QUESTIONS

- None
